geometry_rule: A_s > 1 and D < 0 under the specified source–receiver hypothesis
reported_use: May support the specified source–receiver compatibility claim when other manuscript criteria are met
claim_boundary: Compatibility is not a claim of exact geographic origin, ethnic identity, population continuity, or migration route.

geometry_rule: A_s <= 1 or D >= 0, or the specified source–receiver geometry fails under stable scored conditions
reliability_rule: Failure remains stable under required reliability checks
reported_use: May reject the specified source–receiver hypothesis without assigning an alternative origin
claim_boundary: Rejection of a specified hypothesis is not proof of a different origin, route, ethnicity, or continuity claim.

geometry_rule: Directional geometry is present but depends on scale, branch layer, or visibility choices
reliability_rule: Reliability checks demote the result to support-only or diagnostic use
reported_use: May contextualize the framework but is not load-bearing evidence
claim_boundary: Support-only states should not be promoted to direct evidence of origin, ethnic identity, continuity, or route.

geometry_rule: Geometry cannot be evaluated or cannot be treated as primary evidence
reliability_rule: Insufficient public visibility, branch resolution, statistical power, or broad-root specificity
reported_use: Used to mark abstention or boundary conditions
claim_boundary: No-call states are not positive evidence, direct negative evidence, or origin assignments.
